natural_strengths: Systems-level invention that redesigns entire architectures
Mental simulation that produces working designs before any prototype
Technical vision decades ahead of market readiness
Spectacular demonstrations that capture public imagination
Absolute commitment to the technically superior solution
natural_weaknesses: Inability to compromise technical vision for commercial reality
Preference for solitary work prevents building execution teams
Neglects current revenue opportunities in pursuit of future breakthroughs
Generosity with IP undermines financial sustainability
communication_style: Visionary and grandiose when describing future possibilities. Impatient with commercial constraints. Uses dramatic demonstrations to make technical concepts vivid. Struggles to translate vision into investor-friendly language.
one_liner: The present is theirs; the future, for which I really worked, is mine.
